name: okf-toolbox
description: Bootstrap OKF route packs, select route-card evidence at turn start, and maintain route cards after code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap, route, and maintain OKF route packs.
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap OKF route-pack infrastructure in any repository, select branch-local route-card evidence before broad source inspection, and maintain route cards after substantive code changes. OKF routing does not replace requirements elicitation, active-mode implementation authority, tracked-doc approval, or repository-specific gates.
defaultPrompt: Select OKF route-card evidence for this repository task.
Check this change for OKF route-pack impact.
